name: Neo4j (uvx)
description: Query and explore Neo4j graph databases through MCP. Run read and write Cypher queries and inspect the database schema.

inputs.label: Neo4j URI
inputs.description: Connection URI for your Neo4j instance (Bolt protocol). Use neo4j+s:// for Aura, or bolt://localhost:7687 for a local instance.

obtain.instructions:
1. Open the Neo4j Aura console
2. Select your instance (or create a free AuraDB instance)
3. Copy the Connection URI shown for the instance

inputs.label: Neo4j Username
inputs.description: Database username. Defaults to neo4j for most instances.

inputs.label: Neo4j Password
inputs.description: Password for the database user. For Aura, this is shown once when the instance is created (also saved in the downloaded credentials file).

obtain.instructions:
1. Open the Neo4j Aura console
2. When creating an instance, copy or download the generated password (shown only once)
3. For self-hosted Neo4j, use the password you set on first login

inputs.label: Neo4j Database
inputs.description: Name of the database to connect to. Leave as neo4j unless you use a named database.

auth.instructions: Provide your Neo4j connection URI, username, and password. Create a free AuraDB instance at https://console.neo4j.io to obtain credentials.
